productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Red Polo T-shirt
description: Style NoteTop notch style and comfort, this polo T-shirt from Reid & Taylor is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. The design and attention to detail will earn you fashion accolades, while the fabric keeps you fresh all day. Team this with slim jeans and casual shoes.Product DetailsRed polo T-shirt, has short sleeves with an applique on the right sleeve, spread collar with contrast panelling, half buttoned placket, contrast panelling on the sleeve cuffs extending to the hem and brand logo embroidered on the left chest  Material and Care100% cotton  Wash and dry inside outMachine wash cold in gentle cycle using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low and dry in shadeUse mild ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
